name: libunicode-utf8-perl
title: libunicode-utf8-perl
summary: encoding and decoding of UTF-8 encoding form
description:
encoding and decoding of UTF-8 encoding form
Unicode::UTF8 provides functions
to encode and decode UTF-8 encoding form
as specified by Unicode and ISO/IEC 10646:2011.
.
Performs between 600% and 1200% faster than Encode.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libunicode-utf8-perl because encoding and decoding of UTF-8 encoding form.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libunicode-utf8-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libunicode-utf8-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libunicode-utf8-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
